LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE ARBITRATION AWARD ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT B TO THE PETITION IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE COURT ALSO AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES OF $861,25 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $540.00. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR#7489.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORER's PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS Granted. No opposition filed. The Court confirms the arbitration award attached as Exhibit B to the Petition in its entirety. The Court also awards reasonable attorneys fees of $861,25 and costs in the amount of $540.00. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.
